name: yare-panel
description: YARE Panel - Universal Server Management Platform

scripts.setup: npm install && cd apps/frontend && npm install
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && go mod tidy && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../yare-panel main.go
scripts.build: cd apps/frontend && npm run build && node ../scripts/copy-dist.js && cd ../backend && go mod tidy && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../yare-panel main.go

author: YARE Panel Team
